scenes.title: The Gate
scenes.prompt: A cat walking toward a gate. The gate slowly opens with a glowing light behind it.

scenes.title: The Garden
scenes.prompt: Colorful flowers blooming one by one across the screen. A butterfly flies from left to right.
scenes.narration: The most magical garden appeared before her.

scenes.title: The Wish
scenes.prompt: A large tree with a golden star at the top. The star pulses and sends sparkles downward.
scenes.narration: The ancient tree granted her a wish.
